facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 720 reviews. 100% vegetarian Indian food in Phu Quoc.

Krishna Garden on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the real deal. Dal, paneer, fresh roti, no meat, no compromise on flavour. Vegetarian travellers, this one's for you.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
